{{Quote|Good, Kaja sent you. I need a Force-sensitive apprehended. Name is Zalbar Jyvun.|Chief Inquisitor Loam Redge to an individual|<ref name="SWG" />}}
'''Loam Redge''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] [[Chief Inquisitor|Chief]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] of unknown age whose topmost priorities, as befitted an Inquisitor, were to capture Force-sensitives, [[Torture/Legends|torture]] them, and then destroy them; a task at which he was very good.<ref name="CSWE">[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]</ref> He had rich brown hair and dirt-colored eyes.<ref name="SWG" />

==Biography==
{{Quote|You're back. Adequate job with Zalbar. One of my couriers has gone missing. Find him.|Chief Inquisitor Loam Redge to an individual|<ref name="SWG" />}}
Loam Redge reached the title of Chief Inquisitor during the early years of the Galactic Empire.<ref name="CSWE" />

Redge trained [[Finn Darktrin]], who was sent to recover a [[Datacron/Legends|data holocron]] from the [[Jedi Enclave|Jedi ruins]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Also in the same year, Redge was stationed in the [[Emperor's Retreat/Legends|Emperor's Retreat]] where he met with an individual who had been sent to him by [[Kaja Or'Zee]] after performing several tasks set by her.<ref name="SWG" />

His first task to the individual was a simple one; he had heard of a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] noble who was aiding the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] and thought he could escape Imperial notice, and wanted the man captured. Shortly after capturing the man, and returning him to Redge, the individual was tasked with retrieving another Rebel sympathizer who was in hiding on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Easily completing this task, the individual was then sent to retrieve a [[Datacard/Legends|datadisk]] from a known [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]]. The individual soon killed the slicer, and returned once more to Redge. It is unknown what information was on this disk, but Redge then sent the individual to capture the leader of the group of Rebels who they had been hunting; the individual captured this lead slicer then returned.<ref name="SWG" />

Redge rewarded the individual with a piece of reinforced [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]], then sent them to [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Hethrir]] for further tasks.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Loam_Redge.jpg|100px|thumb|Loam Redge's original appearance, with brown hair]]
Loam Redge appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
